reviews.review_description: this is much better than any other vr travelling apps there, it seems firstly a bit crude, but its logic is very well done, and feels seamless, unlike static travelling vr games out there.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your honest review! This was my first app, if you liked Madeira, try Visit Faroe Islands, Visit Azores, Visit North Spain or Visit Alaska. They have even more content and a bit newer interface.

reviews.review_description: This has amazing views!! I love the fact that it gives you local knowledge and backgrounds of each place that you visit!! Well done!! Would love to be able to walk around though but still i love it!!

developer_response.body:
Hi! 
Thank you for your review! If I would walk around with the camera, it would make the users dizzy. I tried to capture everything in 360 3D videos, so you can stay there on the location as long as you want to. I would need some guassian splat techniques to make it into a walkable world, but that would need to be static and you would not be able to enjoy the real waves, moving trees, levadas, etc. Feel free to try out also the other 3 apps I have made ;) Have a nice day and thanks!

reviews.review_title: Video quality is not that good...
reviews.review_description: It could be a great app but unfortunately the video quality, even on a Quest 3, is too low, too "blurry" and ruins the whole immersive experience. I wish the app had the same crystal quality of some videos seen on Meta Quest TV or other apps... I hope future updates will bring a better video quality.

developer_response.body: Hi! I am sad that it did not met your expectations. In order to fit into 15GB of data so many locations and videos, I have done my best. The quest2 and 3 limits me to 5.7K in 360 3D. It is the best you can get in 3D. if I would use only 360 but not 3D, I could go up to 8K. You are probably comparing it to that. So far, 24 reviews were positive and people really liked it. You can check out Visit Faroe Islands, I think that is even better with more locations as Madeira. If you change your mind,please correct this review. I am trying to get some new content in the future, so keep an eye on updates. Please also consider, that all of the locations have narrative voice overs in 5 different languages.

reviews.review_description:
I love this, just sat for a couple of hours taking in the views and listening to some commentary. Amazing scenery and 360 video. A couple of the sound files could be adjusted as water noise is over the commentary. But commentary can still be heard. Other than that spot on.
Rob.

developer_response.body:
Hi! That is how it is meant to be. I can try to fine tune the volume by some of the locations, you might be right.
If you liked Madeira, you will surely like Visit Faroe Islands. It has over 120 views and even more dramatic places, waterfalls, cliffs and some beaches. Thank you for your honest review!

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this. Sense of seeing something new without leaving the house. Looking forward to more experiences like this. Only problem is I now want to visit Madeira for real and that’s not as cheap.

developer_response.body: You are not the first one to be inspired with my App to travel there. If you liked it, try the Visit Faroe Islands, it has even more locations and view and the videos are even nicer, as I learned a lot by Madeira. Thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description: It looks great. Beginning to become a fan of the mountains. Hope to be there one day irl after seeing how great it is. Recommend!

Virtual Reality offers, as we all know, plenty of comfortable ways to discover different places and experiences. The main strength of VR is immersion, therefore travel apps should be a natural fit for the Quest.

The idea of “Visit Madeira” of developer Peter Nagy is to bring the atmosphere for this unique island surrounded by the Atlantic Ocean right to your living room. You can visit quite a few of the most important touristic hotspots of the island. Every hotspot is shown with stereoscopic videos with a convincing quality. You can navigate through the app via landmark symbols or “quick travel” to another place. A multilingual speaker provides useful information about every hotspot on the island. It is fun to discover the different location and discover small details on the footage. Relaxing music helps to create an immersive atmosphere. 

The app has quite a meditative vibe. It is a good fit if you are searching for an app to casually spend some time with discovering or if you are searching for a worthwhile travel destination.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your honest review! I am glad you enjoyed the app. It should leave exactly such feeling in you as you described.

reviews.review_description: After watching this, my wife and I both agreed that this needs to be our family holiday next year! We are starting to save! Just a beautiful place. Makes you feel like you are there. Video is of a very high quality, sound is superb and the narration interesting. There are so many beautiful places on this gorgeous island. Very well put together. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Hi! I am really glad you like it! Hopefully in the future I will be able to travel there one more time and shoot some more locations. Enough for a Visit Madeira 2 app. My second app called Visit Faroe Islands is now also available on Meta. There are more than 120 viewpoints ;)

reviews.review_description: I just had an amazing time visiting Madeira and time flew by as I was exploring. Really good if you love to travel.

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you enjoyed the app! That is how it should be. A kind of getaway from the daily reality.

reviews.review_description: We plan to travel to Madeira in coming years, so this app was a great "preview" of the island, worth the price. You can look around in all direction and see interesting places in real 3D. Music is also enjoyable with atmospheric sounds. Future suggestions: hide the loop point, add more european languages, maybe add some interactive objects. And next country should be in 8k quality on Quest 3 :) Thanks dev!

developer_response.body: Hi! I am glad you enjoyed the app. I have build it exactly for this reason. Thank you for your constructive feedback! Sadly, I can not increase the resolution of the videos, even if I have them in 8K as original. The meta Quest 2 but also 3 and Pro does not aupport higher than 5.7K 360 3D standalon video playback. To hide the pointers,where you can travel,just click the button on the controller. I made that already to clear the view from them. As interaction, I am planning to add some drone shots of some of the locations I flew in. Which languages you have in mind? Maybe I can add French, Slovakian, Hungarian, Spanish? The next app should be about Faroe islands, I already done the shooting. But it will take a few months to produce the new app. Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: This experience is really immersive thanks to high quality 360° 3D videos. You have a lot of panoramas to discover and make you feel you are really here on the island among other people. Nice job!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, I am still trying to make the app better. In the future, I want to add also some 360 panorama photos, as so far only videos are there. Maybe some 360 drone shots. Keep you eye on my app, there should be another one coming out this year about Faroe Islands.

reviews.review_title: The Madeira tourist board should pay you
reviews.review_description:
... to make this app free to give you an income and widen the audience!
Thanks for the 'Tree Lady' spot! All very helpful for a family who are going to visit Madeira in a couple of weeks, so thank you dev. As someone who has dabbled in making 360 films, I appreciate the effort to film from so many locations. The menu sequence timelapse from the peak is great. Vale a pena! Obrigado!

developer_response.body:
Hi! 
Thank you for your very nice review! Is there something I could do to make it to 5 stars? It would really help to keep the good score.
It took me really a lot of working, programming, shooting the whole week on the vacation, and most of my spare time in the evenings of 2023. 
I am still trying to improve the app. I want to erase on some of the spots the shadow of my tripod and make the colors a bit nicer. I am also working on new translations (Spanish, French) So be on the lookout.

reviews.review_description: I really like this application, it is really well made and especially in different languages, which I welcomed.  I look forward to the new update.  Great job, keep up the good work :)

reviews.review_title: Great look at a beautiful place
reviews.review_description: Visit Madeira is a great experience for exploring a beautiful region of Portugal. The videos are high-quality, and the map navigation is well done. If you can’t get there in the near future, you can get a nice look around in this app!
I like the different view points and narration. It's like a very focused BRINK Traveler. Great stuff!

developer_response.body: Oh, thank you very much. I am honored to be compared with such a big product. Will do my best to make it even better.

reviews.review_description: Cool app for those who want to enjoy the beauty of this island! The atmospheric music makes the immersion even more interesting!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! I am still trying to make the app better and in the background another app about Faroe Islands is in the making ;)

reviews.review_description: Very usable. Scenery is amazing! Pretty straight forward with controls. Educational as well. Beautiful ocean and stunning waterfalls!

developer_response.body: I am glad you liked it. There is now a new app called Visit Faroe Islands, it has more locations and over 120 views. It has better colors and sounds, as I learned from Madeira.

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed this experience 
It's very easy to use and the graphics are pretty good 
Can't wait for the developer to do more experiences like this

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your review! I am glad you liked it! If there is something I can make better, please let me know. I would love to make everyone happy and maybe get the 5ft star ;)

reviews.review_title: Now I want to live this in real life!
reviews.review_description:
As someone from South America, I never heard about this place. The 360 video recordings have a high quality and I loved hearing the narrator about the place I was checking out.
After this quick VR visit, I had the urge to check how much it would cost me to travel there for some holidays. I never played an app like this before but now I am wondering if there are more like this to be able to visit places till I have the opportunity to do it in real life!

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you for your honest review. I am glad that my app fulfilled its intention. As my next project, I am starting to work on Visit Faroe. It should be finished around summer 2024. Maybe sooner. So keep your heads up. I will make an update to Visit Madeira as well to advertise it when it comes out. Thank you again for the nice review!

reviews.review_description: This experience is truly immersive thanks to high-quality 360° 3D video and 3D audio. There are many different panoramas to discover which are very interesting.
